description_long: A stack of golden-brown pancakes sits neatly on a round, white ceramic plate, with a square pat of butter melting on the topmost pancake. The pancakes are fluffy and evenly stacked, with slightly crisped edges visible from the side. The plate is placed on a rustic wooden table, partially covered by a beige table runner. Surrounding the pancakes are additional objects: a small white vase with a single red rose, two white pillar candles of different heights, and a small packet of what appears to be syrup or jam. The pancakes are the central focus, with the butter pat glistening slightly, suggesting warmth. No syrup is visible on or around the pancakes, and there is no garnish other than the butter.
description: A stack of fluffy pancakes with a pat of butter sits on a white ceramic plate atop a rustic wooden table, surrounded by candles and a vase with a red rose.
description_view_0: From this end-on view, the stack of pancakes with a butter pat is visible at the far end of the table, with two white pillar candles in the foreground.
description_view_1: This side view shows the full stack of pancakes on a white plate, the butter pat on top, and the red rose in a white vase next to a candle.
description_view_2: From the opposite end, the pancakes and butter are closest, with the vase, candles, and a small packet visible further back.
description_view_3: This side view highlights the pancakes, butter, and plate, with the candles and vase grouped together and a small packet beside the plate.
